openweb.sample.ui.screens.settings.prefe.app:summary: Choose where article info comes from
openweb.sample.ui.screens.settings.prefe.app:title: Article Information Strategy

openweb.sample.ui.screens.settings.prefe.app:summary: Enter the associated URL for local article info
openweb.sample.ui.screens.settings.prefe.app:title: Article Associated URL

SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:summary: Hide the article header in conversation view
SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:title: Hide Article Header

openweb.sample.ui.screens.settings.prefe.app:summary: Enabling it will prevent users from posting comments
openweb.sample.ui.screens.settings.prefe.app:title: Read Only Mode

SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:summary: Allow users to add social review ratings
SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:title: Enable Social Reviews
